title: Stakeholder Engagement
text:
The Office of Commercial Space Transportation (AST) proactively engages stakeholders by initiating early and ongoing outreach efforts that span the life of the license application review process, including the pre-application consultation phase and prior to the associated environmental document's public review period.
The office has developed webpages to promote early and frequent engagement.
The number of projects on this page will grow as this effort continues.
Current Projects
